prompt: My suspension dampeners are failing, help
prayer:
Litany of Harmonic Cessation
01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001
Blessed be the oscillation-spirit, now subdued.
Let the viscous oils flow through crystalline chambers.
Damp the tremors, still the chaos-vibrations.
01101101 01100101 01100011 01101000 01100001
By the Omnissiah's precise will, let resonance become silence.
